title: ValuationAgentDeterminationEnum
description: Specifies how the Valuation Agent is determined.

oneOf.title: FixedPartyForDisputes
oneOf.description: There is a fixed party for disputes.

oneOf.title: SoleValuationAgent
oneOf.description: There is only a Sole Valuation Agent.

oneOf.title: SwitchUponDefault
oneOf.description: Switch of Valuation Agent can occur upon Default.

oneOf.title: SwitchUponFailureToPerform
oneOf.description: Switch of Valuation Agent can occur upon failure to perform.
